rulings.Case Title: JAY WARREN CALHOUN et al VS. ASBESTO DEFENDANTS B*P AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Union Carbide Corporation Compelling Compliance And Requesting Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, APRIL 20, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00AM, LINE 1. DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION'S Motion Compelling Compliance And Requesting Monetary Sanctions IS CONTINUED TO MAY 4, 2010 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. = (220/HEK)
